svg.title: Kannika system — data flow diagram
svg.desc: Level-1 DFD showing external entities UC4 and ForgeRock, core processes Kannika and Event Gateway, data stores Kafka and S3, and observability processes Armory Console and Splunk.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Kannika process do in the data flow?')
sendPrompt('What does Event Gateway process in the data flow?')
sendPrompt('What data does Armory Console receive?')
